case_title: SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES, VS. PAUL BURCH ET AL

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT BURCH, PAUL

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 66825130), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES, A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION SERVED JUL-28-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BURCH, PAUL
